prompt: In my opinion, hard work is the most important part in becoming successful. However, some luck is always helpful. A person should put a lot of effort into the job to reach his goals. Of course, sometimes people can achieve something because they are lucky. However, their success won't last too long without hard work. There are countless examples of people who werelucky enough to be born with a great talant but later couldn't achieve anything because of being too lazy and self-assured . Luck can help you once and let you down later. That's why you should never rely on it. Hard work is fundamental . As they say, hard work alwaysbeats talant. I totally agree with the saying. No luck is helpful if you are a lazy person. On my point of view, all successful people are hardworking. On the other hand, luck and talant can help you start and solve some difficulties. Taking risks can sometimes bring you up and you can use some luck on your path to success. All in all, I think you should put all the effort into the work. If you do it, luck will eventually come. And the combination of hard work and luck is the true key to becoming successful.

TASK: Explain two advantages of the internet for students.
STUDENT_TEXT: On the one hand, internet is good. We can decide many problems online. Im happy.
TEXT_TYPE: essay

TASK: Describe a plan that changed and explain the final outcome.
STUDENT_TEXT: Ideally, we should have go to the park, but it was raining. Nevertheless, the atmosphere was overload with joy.
TEXT_TYPE: essay
TEXTINSPECTOR_LEVEL: B1+

TASK: Give practical time-management advice to classmates.
STUDENT_TEXT: You should organise your week. Write down all deadlines and allocate time for tasks per day. To sum up, set priorities and keep in mind that everyone got same time. It appears that procrastination undermines productivity.
TEXT_TYPE: essay
FLESCH_KINCAID: 10.4

TASK: Discuss whether authorities underestimate a social crisis.
STUDENT_TEXT: It appears that the government tends to underestimate the severity of the crisis. Seldom have we seen such negligence. This may indicate a systemic failure.
TEXT_TYPE: essay

TASK: Write a persuasive formal paragraph on environmental responsibility.
STUDENT_TEXT: We must not ignore the environmental issues lest we face irreversible consequences. Is it not our duty to preserve the planet? We observe a stark contrast: technological triumph vs moral decay.
TEXT_TYPE: essay

TASK: When people succeed, it is entirely because of hard work. Luck has nothing to do with their success. What is your opinion?
STUDENT_TEXT: In my opinion, hard work is the most important part in becoming successful. However, some luck is always helpful. A person should put a lot of effort into the job to reach his goals. Of course, sometimes people can achieve something because they are lucky. However, their success won't last too long without hard work. There are countless examples of people who werelucky enough to be born with a great talant but later couldn't achieve anything because of being too lazy and self-assured . Luck can help you once and let you down later. That's why you should never rely on it. Hard work is fundamental . As they say, hard work alwaysbeats talant. I totally agree with the saying. No luck is helpful if you are a lazy person. On my point of view, all successful people are hardworking. On the other hand, luck and talant can help you start and solve some difficulties. Taking risks can sometimes bring you up and you can use some luck on your path to success. All in all, I think you should put all the effort into the work. If you do it, luck will eventually come. And the combination of hard work and luck is the true key to becoming successful.
TEXT_TYPE: essay
